case_number: Criminal Bail Application stands dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 222 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on MA No.4457/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For hearing of bail application 21.08.2023 Mr. Jam Zuhaib Ahmed, Advocate for the applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 & 3. Learned Counsel does not press this bail application and states that parties have compromised and, therefore, on this fresh ground, he wants to file a fresh application before the trial Court and request that the trial Court may be directed to decide the fresh application on its own merits. Order accordingly. Instant Criminal Bail Application stands dismissed as not pressed in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
